title: Nested estimator parameters modification in a pipeline should refer to valid parameters
description: This rule checks if the nested estimator parameters modification in a pipeline is referring to valid parameters.
message: Nested estimator parameters modification in a pipeline should refer to valid parameters.
recommendation: Use valid parameter names or constants for nested estimator parameters.

noncompliant.description: Using variable name hidden_layer_dropout which is not a valid parameter.

compliant.description: Using valid parameters learning_rate and hidden_layer_activation.

why_is_this_an_issue: Using invalid parameter names can lead to unexpected behavior and make code harder to understand and maintain.
how_to_fix: Use valid parameter names or constants for nested estimator parameters.
function_code:
def check_nested_estimator_parameters_modification_in_a_pipeline_should_refer_to_valid_parameters(node):
    return any(arg not in VALID_PARAMETERS for arg in node['func']['args'])

metadata.title: Nested estimator parameters modification in a pipeline should refer to valid parameters
